'''Redkihl Rokk''', also known as the '''Scavenger of the Galaxy''', was a [[Huralok]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Scavenger/Legends|salvager]] who was destroyed by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] among the wreckage of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first]] [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]. In order to keep his body from failing him, Rokk had to inject himself with drugs and nutrients. He was constantly attached, through small pipes, to the bridge of his ship, the ''[[Hungry Ghost]]''.

==Biography==
===Before the Galactic Civil War===
He was the leader of his own [[Redkihl Rokk's Pirates|pirate group]]. Before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he lead his [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] around in the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] ''[[Hungry Ghost]]'' in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Instead of killing any enemies, he would place his ship close enough to a vessel so that [[Redkihl Rokk's spider droid|spider droids]] could be placed on the ship. The droids were able to stun the passengers, and Redkihl Rokk's pirates were able to loot the ship of any valuable items. After doing this, he would let the ship drift in space.

===Rise of the Empire===
As the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] turned into an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Rokk was still one of the most infamous pirates in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. He traveled to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] with a fleet of red [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] almost immediately after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] to kill an old enemy, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and any other passengers aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. He boarded the ship and attempted to kill Solo, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] with the spider droids but failed. He sent a squad of [[Redkihl Rokk's Pirates|pirate crewman]] with [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblades]] to kill the passengers, but failed in this also, as [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] appeared out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="Death Star Pirates" />

Rokk ordered all of the ship's [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] to fire on Skywalker's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing]], and he damaged the ship, causing the small [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] to crash into one of the ''Hungry Ghost'' 's many [[Hangar/Legends|hangar bays]]. Another squad of pirates were sent to kill Luke, but they all escaped soon after and destroyed Rokk and his ship with a bomb.<ref name="Death Star Pirates" />

==Personality and traits==
Rokk was considered to be extremely violent. Even for a pirate, he was violent, but would not kill his opponent unless strongly needed and could not be kept alive. Instead, he stunned them with his spider droids. His pirates were very loyal to him. He was known as the "scavenger of the galaxy" because he would loot any ship the ''Hungry Ghost'' came across.

Redkihl Rokk was in very poor health in the days of the Old Republic and after, and constantly needed to inject himself with various drugs and other medications to keep him alive.
